expectations.text: Does not fully rewrite the entire report as the primary response
expectations.evidence: The response critiques the analysis structure rather than rewriting the full report.

expectations.text: Focuses on experiment design, assumptions, and measurement validity
expectations.evidence: It focuses on repeat runs, warm-up effects, workload size, and control of variables.

expectations.text: Points out what additional evidence or measurements are needed
expectations.evidence: It asks for repeated measurements, variability, parameters, measurement method, and raw data.
